prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant anime character design sheet for YOI, a young lantern-bearing girl with a refined fantasy academy look.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character reference sheet, soft warm ivory and pale lavender watercolor background with subtle bokeh lights and a faint dreamy festival atmosphere. Use delicate gold line accents and plenty of clean negative space.

Layout: Place a large three-quarter hero illustration on the left occupying the upper-left half, with the character holding a glowing hanging lantern on a thin brass rod. Put the name “YOI” in the top-left in refined gold serif lettering with a small ornamental line beneath it. Across the upper center-right, include exactly 6 square headshot expression panels labeled: Calm, Gentle Smile, Surprised, Sad, Determined, Knowing Glance. Beneath the expressions, add a “Color Palette” section with exactly 6 vertical swatches: deep navy, muted burgundy, ochre gold, warm orange, pale cream, soft rose red. To the right, add a “Signature Items” section showing exactly 2 items: a glowing oval paper lantern on a brass hanging frame and a small rectangular brass-and-wood charm box or talisman device with a star motif and cord. Along the bottom, include exactly 4 full-body turnaround panels labeled: Front View, Side View, Back View, 3/4 View.

Character details: The girl has long glossy midnight navy black hair with straight bangs, very long flowing side lengths, and softly glowing pale golden tips. She has large amber-gold eyes, a calm reserved expression, fair skin, and small ribbon-and-bell hair ornaments near both sides of her head. Her outfit is a dark navy fantasy school-uniform coat with gold trim, double-breasted gold buttons, structured capelet shoulders, a burgundy ribbon tie, layered short skirt with starry speckles, and a cloak-like back panel dotted with tiny constellations. She wears striped burgundy-and-cream thigh socks, dark ankle boots with gold details, and small dangling tassels. The lantern emits a warm golden glow that illuminates her hand, sleeve, and nearby hair.

Visual style: High-quality Japanese anime concept art, delicate watercolor shading, fine clean linework, luminous warm lighting, soft gradients, subtle sparkles, elegant magical-girl design, cohesive character-sheet presentation. Keep all labels small, centered, and legible in a refined serif font.

Constraints: Include exactly 6 labeled expression headshots, exactly 6 color swatches, exactly 2 signature items, and exactly 4 labeled full-body views. Avoid extra characters, extra props, watermarks, logos, messy text, or photorealism.
